reviews.comment:
El encargado me cargo tanque lleno de super cuando le pedí infinia. Obvio que no se hizo cargo y dijo que era mi culpa... el resto de los empleados unos maleducados

(Translated by Google)
The manager filled my tank with groceries when I asked for Infinia. Obviously, he didn't take responsibility and said it was my fault... the rest of the employees were rude.
